action_instability.description: Abrupt action jumps, high jerk, or unstable chunk boundaries.

action_saturation.description: Commands repeatedly hit clamp or joint limits.

visual_ood.description: Observation is outside the visual distribution used for SFT.

language_mismatch.description: Task or subtask label does not match the demonstrated behavior.

grasp_lost.description: Object was grasped and then lost during transport or manipulation.

contact_failure.description: Policy fails at contact-rich insertion, pushing, or fine alignment.

recovery_failure.description: Policy cannot return to a valid task state after perturbation or drift.
